name: bobby
description: An open, OpenClaw-style chat dashboard that sits on top of your existing LLM harnesses (Claude Code, Hermes, pi), saves every chat, and distills memories into Obsidian.

scripts.dev: pnpm --filter @bobby/shared build && concurrently -n shared,server,web -c gray,blue,magenta "pnpm --filter @bobby/shared dev" "pnpm --filter @bobby/server dev" "pnpm --filter @bobby/web dev"
scripts.build: pnpm --filter @bobby/shared build && pnpm --filter @bobby/server build && pnpm --filter @bobby/web build
scripts.refresh: git pull --ff-only && pnpm install && pnpm build
